title: AgencyMatchingRequirementPercentage
description: The percentage of either the total funding opportunity project cost or award amount that must be provide that must be provided from non-Federal sources as mandatory matching or voluntary committed cost sharing/matching.
x-grantsActivityReferences: GRM.010.010 Grant Program Set-up and Maintenance
x-relatedElements: (3) Formula Matching Requirements Maintenance of Effort - Matching Requirements
